text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking through the<n>central plaza, I
hear a huge argument<n>unfolding.

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Are you seriously looking down on<n>races in
Japan?

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
No... I just think it's obviously better<n>if you can
compete overseas as well.

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! You're saying domestic<n>races aren't
good enough!

The conversation seems rather<n>heated. Just as I
think that I should<n>step in...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hey! That's enough, you two. Let's<n>take it down
a notch, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I think I know what went wrong here.<n>At first, you
were comparing the<n>virtues of races in Japan to
those<n>abroad...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But then your passion swelled, and<n>before you
knew it, your emotions got<n>the better of you.

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah, because she said—

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes, I know. Calm down, please.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Now then, it's true that there are a lot<n>of
differences between Japanese<n>and international
races.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure it's also true that,<n>wherever the race
is, every<n>participant wants to do their very<n>best.
Don't you think that puts them<n>on the same level?

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, perhaps it's a bit challenging to<n>put into
words. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: I've got a plan! Start the music!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's put those hard-to-say<n>feelings into
song! Express them with<n>your body!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Sing! Dance! Move at your own pace<n>and find
your groove! Try to convey<n>your feelings to each
other! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Convey our feelings...

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Okay. I, uh, want to keep competing<n>with you!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's it! Move to the rhythm!

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I don't care whether it's<n>domestic or
overseas! As long as I'm<n>with you, my life is
exhilarating!

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes, me too! You're my one and onlyrival! You make my heart race!

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Look, I'm really sorry! Let's keepwriting our story together!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ah, beautiful! Beautiful! You poured<n>your hearts
out!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Now that's... friendship!

And so, Seeking the Pearl's unique<n>method of
conflict resolution helps the<n>two students
reconcile.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now that their problems are<n>solved, how
about you?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You look like you have something to<n>say. Come
on, communicate with<n>your body!
While I'm not particularly dissatisfiedwith my recent performance, I dowant to grow even more as a trainer!

With that in mind, I sing loud enough<n>to set my
soul on fire!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, perfect! Louder! Let it all out! Go<n>beyond your
limits! Higher! Higher!
While I'm not particularly dissatisfiedwith my recent life, I am sick offeeling tired all the time!

With that in mind, I dance so wildly<n>that I can feel
the fatigue leaving my<n>soul!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, dump all that fatigue! Abandon<n>your fears!
Dance the night away!

Now that I think about it... I have no<n>complaints
about anything! I'm<n>completely happy with who I
am right<n>now!

With that in mind, I strike a pose and<n>feel even
more satisfied with my life!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ah, perfect! Impeccable!Magnificent!
